name: Push-ups
description: Chest lowers under control. Full lockout at top.

name: Glute bridges
description: Heels down. Hips fully extended at top.

name: Air squats
description: Hip crease below knee. Full extension at top.

name: Reverse snow angels
description: Prone. Arms lift fully off floor. Slow and controlled pull each rep.

name: Sit-ups
description: Shoulders touch ground. Sit fully upright each rep.

name: Single-arm push-ups on raised bench
description: 25 reps per arm. Chest lowers under control. Full lockout.

name: Prone Y-raises
description: Arms form a Y. Hands lift off floor with scapular control.

name: Stationary lunges
description: 25 reps per side. Rear knee lowers under control. Stand tall each rep.

name: Standing calf raises
description: Full rise onto toes. Controlled lower.

name: Mountain climbers
description: 25 reps per side. Knee drives toward chest under control.

name: Decline push-ups
description: Feet elevated. Chest lowers below elbows. Full lockout.

name: Plank to alternating toe touch
description: 25 touches per side. Opposite hand to toe. Hips controlled.

name: Step-ups
description: 25 reps per side. Full foot on bench. Stand tall at top.

name: Hip thrusts (bench)
description: Upper back on bench. Full hip extension each rep.

name: Bicycle crunches
description: 25 reps per side. Controlled rotation.

name: Wide push-ups
description: Hands wider than shoulders. Chest lowers under control.

name: Floor swimmers
description: Prone. Alternating arm pulls with shoulder control.

name: Tempo squats
description: 3-second descent. Full extension at top.

name: Russian twists
description: 25 reps per side. Torso controlled throughout.

name: Bear crawl steps
description: Opposite hand and foot move together. Count steps.

name: Bench dips
description: Elbows bend under control. Full lockout at top.

name: Prone leg raises, Scap squeeze
description: Legs straight then raise. Palms off floor squeeze scap

name: Split squats
description: 25 reps per side. Back knee lowers under control.

name: Single-leg glute bridges
description: 25 reps per side. Hips fully extend each rep.

name: Leg raises
description: Lower back stays controlled on ground.

name: Narrow (diamond) push-ups
description: Hands close together. Chest lowers under control.

name: Prone W-raises
description: Elbows bent. Scapular retraction each rep.

name: Lateral lunges
description: 25 reps per side. Sit into hip. Stand tall.

name: Plank shoulder taps
description: 25 taps per side. Hips stable.

name: Crab walks
description: Left right 1 step, 25 each direction.

name: Pike push-ups
description: Hips high. Head lowers toward ground under control.

name: Prone chest-lift holds
description: 5 seconds per rep. Chest lifts off floor. Controlled hold.

name: Pulse squats
description: Partial-range pulses in squat position.

name: Hamstring walkouts
description: Heels walk out and in under control.

name: Flutter kicks
description: 25 reps per side. Core braced throughout.

name: Broad jumps
description: Two-foot takeoff. Soft, controlled landing.

name: Hand-release push-ups
description: Hands lift off floor at bottom. Full lockout.

name: Seal jacks
description: Prone jumping-jack arms. Controlled pull motion.

name: Curtsy lunges
description: 25 reps per side. Controlled depth.

name: V-ups
description: Arms and legs meet at top under control.

name: Straight-leg bench dips
description: Legs extended. Elbows bend under control.

name: Bear plank row pulls
description: From bear plank, pull elbow back each rep.

name: Prisoner get-ups
description: Hands on head. Stand to ground and back up under control.

name: Single-leg Romanian hinges
description: 25 reps per side. Hinge at hip. Neutral spine.

name: Crunches
description: Shoulders lift off floor. Controlled tempo.

name: Plank ladder
description: One up-and-down cycle equals one rep. Alternate lead arm.

name: Tempo push-ups
description: 3-second descent. Full lockout at top.

name: Jump squats
description: Step-back option allowed. Soft landings.

name: Hollow body to pause
description: Pause at hollow. Accumulate time as needed.

name: Burpees
description: Chest to ground. Finish standing tall. Final movement.
